name: Double Detective
short_description: Double Detective is a relaxing and peaceful puzzle game! Spot subtle differences between two dioramas, and test your observation skills across 80 unique levels. Can you find them all?
detailed_description:
What is Double Detective?

Double Detective is a short and casual puzzle game where players need to spot differences between two isometric dioramas.

Features

80 handmade levels!
Fully 3D where you can rotate and zoom in up close!
Relax with our groovy tunes!
Meditative gameplay with no timers, meters or scores!

Change the way you look at things - Play in a 3D environment and interact with the scene by adjusting your angle and zooming in your view.


Relax and have fun at your own pace - There are no time limits or scores, so you don’t have to worry about how long you spend in a level. Set your favorite music and enjoy!

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Japanese*, Korean*, Russian*, Traditional Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
